empty.title: No images yet
empty.description: Be the first to share something amazing with the community. Start by uploading your favorite images.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to Slink
login.demo_mode_description: Try the application with the test credentials
login.demo_mode_footer: Automatically fills credentials and signs you in
login.need_account_description: Create one to start sharing images

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join Slink to start sharing your images
signup.already_have_account_description: Sign in to access your images

awaiting_approval.under_review: Your account is currently under review
awaiting_approval.what_happens_next_description: Your account is being reviewed and will be activated once approved. Please check back later for updates on your account status.
awaiting_approval.need_help_description: Contact the administrator if you have questions about your account or the review process.
awaiting_approval.account_reference_description: Provide this ID when contacting the administrator
awaiting_approval.approved_and_activated: Your account has been approved and activated
awaiting_approval.all_features_unlocked_description: Upload, share, and manage your content with full access to all platform features. Start creating and sharing your content.
awaiting_approval.ready_to_get_started_description: Sign in to your account to begin using all the platform features or explore the public gallery to see what others are sharing.
awaiting_approval.ready_to_continue_description: Sign in to access all platform features

search.title: No images found
search.description_prefix: No images match your search for
search.description_suffix: Try a different search term or browse all images.

navbar.upload_description: Share your media with others by uploading them and organizing them into collections.
navbar.toggle_theme_description: Switch between light and dark mode.

guest_banner.title: Guest Upload
guest_banner.description: You can upload images without an account, but consider signing in to manage them

login_required_banner.title: Sign in to continue
login_required_banner.description: Upload and manage your images securely

toast.only_one_file: Only one file allowed at a time

form.drop_subtitle: or click to browse from your device

success.title: Upload Successful!
success.description: Your image has been successfully uploaded to Slink.
success.guest_notice_description: To manage your images and access additional features, consider creating an account.

history.title: Upload History
history.subtitle: View and manage your uploaded images

empty.filtered_description: No images match your current tag filters. Try removing some tags or clearing all filters.
empty.title: No history yet
empty.description: Your upload history will appear here. Start uploading images to see your files and manage them easily.

tags.title: My Tags
tags.subtitle: Create and organize tags for your images
tags.empty_description: Create your first tag to get started

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Organize your images into albums
collections.empty_description: Create your first collection to organize and share your images.

detail.title: Collection
detail.not_found_description: This collection doesn't exist or you don't have permission to view it.
detail.empty_owner_description: Upload images directly to this collection.
detail.empty_guest_description: No items in this collection yet.

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.subtitle: Your saved images from the community
bookmarks.empty_description: Start exploring and bookmark images you love to find them here later.

faq.meta_description: Frequently asked questions about Slink - image sharing platform
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using Slink for image sharing and management
faq.more_questions_description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please get in touch with us for further assistance.

questions.image_visibility: What is the visibility of my images?
questions.share_feature: Can I share my images with others?
questions.found_an_issue: I found an issue, how can I report it?

supported_formats.supported_mime_types: Slink supports the following mime types:
supported_formats.converted_note: * Source images are forced to be converted to JPEG format.

image_visibility.where_people_share: , where people can share their images with others.
image_visibility.public_description: Images are shared in the public gallery and visible to all users
image_visibility.private_description: Images are not shared in the public gallery and only accessible by the owner
image_visibility.raw_images_note: Raw images are accessible to anyone with a direct link, regardless of visibility setting.

share_feature.intro: You can easily share your images with others using the direct link provided for each uploaded image.
share_feature.link_access: Link accessible to anyone who has it
share_feature.roadmap_intro: I'm working on advanced sharing features that will give you more control over your image sharing:

issue_report.intro: I appreciate your help in making Slink better! If you've encountered a bug or have suggestions for improvement, here's how you can help:
issue_report.check_existing: Check if the issue has already been reported
issue_report.try_other_browser: Try reproducing the issue in a different browser
issue_report.gather_details: Gather relevant details (browser, steps to reproduce, screenshots)
issue_report.github_description: GitHub Issues is my primary platform for tracking bugs and feature requests. Your reports help me prioritize improvements.
issue_report.thank_you_description: Every report helps me improve Slink for the entire community. I review all issues and prioritize fixes based on impact and frequency.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_description: You'll see activity on your images here

dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your application's key metrics and activity

latest_users.subtitle: Recently joined members
latest_users.empty_default: Users will appear here once they join

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage access control and user authentication settings

sso.title: Single Sign-On
sso.callback_help: Add this callback URL to your identity provider's allowed redirect URIs:

new.title: Add Provider
new.select_provider_description: Select an identity provider to configure

form.enabled_hint: Allow users to authenticate with this provider

delete.title: Delete Provider
delete.provider_removed: Provider and its configuration will be removed

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Configure your default settings and preferences

navigation.default_landing_page_hint: The page to show when you visit the site

uploads.default_visibility_hint: New uploads will be set to public or private by default

licensing.default_license_hint: This license will be automatically applied to new uploads
licensing.sync_to_existing_images_hint: Apply this license to all your existing images

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Slink with ShareX and other tools via API keys

api_keys.empty_description: Create an API key to integrate with ShareX and other tools

create.title: Create API Key
create.description: Generate a secure key for external integrations
create.security_notice_message: Your API key will be displayed only once after creation. Store it securely in your password manager or environment variables. If lost, you'll need to generate a new one.

created.success_description: Your API key has been created
created.api_key_placeholder: Your API key will appear here...
created.notice_message: This key will not be shown again. Store it securely in your password manager or download the ShareX config file below.

delete.title: Revoke API Key
delete.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
delete.description: This API key will be permanently revoked and cannot be recovered

service.sharex_only_for_newly_created: ShareX config can only be downloaded for newly created keys. Please create a new key to download the config.

license.title: License
license.description: Choose how others can use this image

resize.title: Resize
resize.description: Adjust dimensions for the shared link

filter.title: Filter
filter.description: Apply a color filter to the shared link

share.title: Share
share.description: Resize, filter, and format changes apply only to the shared link. The original image remains unchanged.

api_errors.COMMENT_EDIT_OWN_ONLY: You can only edit your own comments
api_errors.COMMENT_DELETE_NOT_ALLOWED: You can only delete your own comments or comments on your images
api_errors.BOOKMARKERS_VIEW_OWN_IMAGE_ONLY: You can only view bookmarkers for your own images
api_errors.DATE_RANGE_INVALID: Start date must be before end date
api_errors.REQUEST_INVALID_FORM_DATA: Request payload contains invalid form data
api_errors.VALIDATION_REQUIRED: This value should not be blank
api_errors.AUTH_USERNAME_EQUALS_EMAIL: Username cannot be the same as email
api_errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_MISSING_NUMBER: Password must contain at least one number
api_errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_MISSING_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
api_errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
api_errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_MISSING_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least one special character
api_errors.AUTH_USERNAME_CONSECUTIVE_SPECIAL: Username cannot contain consecutive special characters
api_errors.DISPLAY_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Display name must be at least 3 characters long
api_errors.DISPLAY_NAME_TOO_LONG: Display name must be at most 30 characters long
api_errors.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters long
api_errors.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be at most 30 characters long
api_errors.AUTH_LOGIN_REQUIRED_FOR_PASSWORD_CHANGE: You must be logged in to change your password
api_errors.AUTH_SSO_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: SSO provider is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
api_errors.API_KEY_NOT_OWNED: API key does not belong to user
api_errors.API_KEY_NOT_FOUND_OR_EXPIRED: API key not found or expired
api_errors.IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_POSITIVE_REQUIRED: Width and height must be positive integers
api_errors.IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_AT_LEAST_ONE_REQUIRED: At least one dimension (width or height) must be specified
api_errors.IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_ORIGINAL_REQUIRED_FOR_R: Original dimensions are required when only one target dimension is specified
api_errors.IMAGE_FRAME_COUNT_MIN_1: Frame count must be at least 1
api_errors.IMAGE_WIDTH_POSITIVE_REQUIRED: Width must be a positive integer when provided
api_errors.IMAGE_HEIGHT_POSITIVE_REQUIRED: Height must be a positive integer when provided
api_errors.TAG_NAME_INVALID_CHARS: Tag name can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
api_errors.TAG_MOVE_TO_DESCENDANT_FORBIDDEN: Cannot move a tag to one of its descendants
api_errors.TAG_MOVE_TO_SELF_FORBIDDEN: Cannot move a tag to itself
api_errors.NOTIFICATION_MARK_READ_OWN_ONLY: You can only mark your own notifications as read
api_errors.SETTINGS_PASSWORD_LENGTH_TOO_SHORT: Password length cannot be less than 3
api_errors.SETTINGS_PASSWORD_LENGTH_TOO_LONG: Password length cannot be greater than 64
api_errors.SETTINGS_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_TOO_SMALL: Max size cannot be less than 0
api_errors.SETTINGS_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_TOO_LARGE: Max size cannot be greater than 1000

active_filter.toggle_aria: Toggle between matching all or any selected tags
active_filter.match_all_description: Images must have every selected tag to appear in results.
active_filter.match_any_description: Images with at least one selected tag will appear in results.
active_filter.switch_to_any: Click to switch to match any
active_filter.switch_to_all: Click to switch to match all

move_dialog.title: Move Tag
move_dialog.description_suffix: to a new parent tag or to root
move_dialog.leave_empty_hint: Leave empty to move to root level

create_form.description: Add a new tag to organize your images
create_form.notice_message: Tags help organize your images. Parent tags create a hierarchy for better organization. You can always move tags later or create sub-tags within existing ones.

actions.delete_failed: Failed to delete collection. Please try again later.
actions.image_remains: Image will remain in your library

form.organize_description: Organize your images into a shareable collection
form.notice_message: Collections let you group images together and share them with a single link. You can add or remove images at any time after creating the collection.

errors.update_visibility: Failed to update visibility. Please try again later.
errors.generate_share_link: Failed to generate share link. Please try again later.
errors.delete_image: Failed to delete image. Please try again later.

reset_dialog.title: Reset Setting
reset_dialog.confirm_message_prefix: Are you sure you want to reset
reset_dialog.warning: This action cannot be undone. Your current setting will be lost.

cache.title: Cache Management
cache.image_cache_hint: Cached files store transformed versions of images (resized, cropped, format converted) to improve performance. Clearing the cache will regenerate files on next request.

image.title: Image Settings
image.description: Configure image upload limits and processing options

max_size.label: Maximum Image Size
max_size.hint: Set the maximum size limit for image uploads

strip_exif.label: Strip EXIF Metadata
strip_exif.hint: Automatically remove metadata from uploaded images for privacy

allow_only_public.label: Allow Only Public Images
allow_only_public.hint: When enabled, all images are automatically set to public and visibility cannot be changed

dedup.label: Enable Image Deduplication
dedup.hint: Detect and reject duplicate images during upload
dedup.notice: Only applies to new uploads. Existing images are not affected.

compression_quality.label: Compression Quality
compression_quality.hint: Quality level for lossy image compression (1-100). Used during format conversion if target format supports it

force_conversion.label: Force Format Conversion
force_conversion.hint: Automatically convert all uploaded images to a specific format

target_format.label: Target Format
target_format.hint: Format to convert uploaded images to

convert_animated.label: Convert Animated Images
convert_animated.hint: Include animated images (GIF, animated WebP/AVIF) in conversion
convert_animated.notice_processing: Processing animated images is CPU-intensive and may slow down uploads.
convert_animated.notice_loss_suffix: will result in loss of animation.

enable_licensing.label: Enable Licensing
enable_licensing.hint: Allow users to set licenses on their images (Creative Commons, etc.)

storage.title: Storage Configuration
storage.description: Choose how and where your data is stored

server_host.label: Server Host
server_host.hint: IP address or hostname of your SMB server

share_name.label: Share Name
share_name.hint: The name of the shared folder

custom_provider.label: Custom S3 Provider
custom_provider.hint: Enable for S3-compatible services like MinIO, Cloudflare R2, or Wasabi. This unlocks custom endpoint and path-style options.

s3.pricing_notice: Amazon S3 usage may incur charges.

custom_endpoint.label: Custom Endpoint
custom_endpoint.hint: Custom S3 endpoint URL for your provider

region_optional.label: Region (Optional)
region_optional.hint: Most S3-compatible providers do not require a region. Leave empty for Cloudflare R2 or providers that auto-detect. Use "auto" or a specific region if required by your provider.

force_path_style.label: Force Path-Style URLs
force_path_style.hint: Enable if your provider requires path-style buckets (http://host/bucket/key). Common for MinIO and self-hosted solutions.

region.label: Region
region.hint: AWS region where your bucket is located (e.g., us-east-1).

access.title: Access Control
access.description: Configure guest access and upload permissions

guest_upload.label: Guest Upload
guest_upload.hint: Allow unauthenticated users to upload images without creating an account. When enabled without Guest Access, users will see a success message but cannot browse uploaded images

guest_access.label: Guest Access (View-Only)
guest_access.hint: Allow unauthenticated users to view and browse images

user.title: User Management
user.description: Control user registration, authentication, and security requirements

registration.label: User Registration
registration.hint: Allow new users to create accounts

approval_required.label: Require Admin Approval
approval_required.hint: New users must be approved before accessing the app

url_shortening.label: URL Shortening
url_shortening.hint: Generate short URLs when copying image links

release_modal.update_description: A new version of Slink is available. Here's what's new:
release_modal.latest_description: You're running the latest version of Slink. Here are the release notes:

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and security settings

display_name.label: Display Name
display_name.hint: This is how your name will appear across the platform

current.label: Current Password
current.hint: Enter your current password to verify your identity
